title: HubSpot vs Loops (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: HubSpot vs Loops: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between HubSpot and Loops comes down to your specific use case. HubSpot is built for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform, while Loops targets SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

comparison_table.tool_a: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform
comparison_table.tool_b: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails

faq.a: It depends on your use case. HubSpot wins for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform, while Loops is stronger for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, HubSpot or Loops?
faq.a: HubSpot starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Loops to HubSpot?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
